description: You are the General Manager at a fine dining restaurant. Format the draft Spring Tasting Menu at /home/ga/Documents/spring_menu_raw.odt for customer presentation and create an Allergen Matrix for the staff. The title 'Spring Tasting Menu' must be Centered, Bold, and at least 16pt font. Section headers ('STARTERS', 'MAINS', 'DESSERTS') should be Heading 1 and Centered, dish names should be Heading 2, and dish descriptions should be Italic. At the bottom of the document, create an 'Allergen Matrix' table with 7 columns ('Dish Name', 'Dairy', 'Gluten', 'Shellfish', 'Nuts', 'Soy', 'Eggs') and 9 rows, marking an 'X' for each allergen identified in the document's inline notes. Remove all '[Allergens: ...]' tags and brackets from the document and save the changes.
